name: Documentation
about: Suggest improvements or report issues with documentation.

**Which document(s) need updates?**
Specify the file(s) or section(s) in need of revision.

**What is the issue?**
Describe the problem (e.g. outdated steps, typos, unclear architecture models).

**Proposed Changes**
Provide suggestions or drafts of what the updated text should say.
